<details>
<summary>astral-sh/ruff (ruff)</summary>

### [`v0.15.10`](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#01510)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/compare/0.15.9...0.15.10)

Released on 2026-04-09.

##### Preview features

- \[`flake8-logging`] Allow closures in except handlers (`LOG004`) ([#​24464](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24464))
- \[`flake8-self`] Make `SLF` diagnostics robust to non-self-named variables ([#​24281](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24281))
- \[`flake8-simplify`] Make the fix for `collapsible-if` safe in `preview` (`SIM102`) ([#​24371](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24371))

##### Bug fixes

- Avoid emitting multi-line f-string elements before Python 3.12 ([#​24377](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24377))
- Avoid syntax error from `E502` fixes in f-strings and t-strings ([#​24410](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24410))
- Strip form feeds from indent passed to `dedent_to` ([#​24381](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24381))
- \[`pyupgrade`] Fix panic caused by handling of octals (`UP012`) ([#​24390](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24390))
- Reject multi-line f-string elements before Python 3.12 ([#​24355](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24355))

##### Rule changes

- \[`ruff`] Treat f-string interpolation as potential side effect (`RUF019`) ([#​24426](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24426))

##### Server

- Add support for custom file extensions ([#​24463](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24463))

##### Documentation

- Document adding fixes in CONTRIBUTING.md ([#​24393](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24393))
- Fix JSON typo in settings example ([#​24517](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff/pull/24517))

##### Contributors

- [@​charliermarsh](https://redirect.github.com/charliermarsh)
- [@​dylwil3](https://redirect.github.com/dylwil3)
- [@​silverstein](https://redirect.github.com/silverstein)
- [@​anishgirianish](https://redirect.github.com/anishgirianish)
- [@​shizukushq](https://redirect.github.com/shizukushq)
- [@​zanieb](https://redirect.github.com/zanieb)
- [@​AlexWaygood](https://redirect.github.com/AlexWaygood)

</details>

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/compare/v0.9.16...v0.9.17)

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v0.9.17 -->

#### What's Changed

##### 🚀 New Features

- Support BBEdit hang on LSP shutdown by [@​ya7010](https://redirect.github.com/ya7010) in [#​1690](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/pull/1690)
- feat: Add autolib configuration to disable automatic discovery of lib targets by [@​ya7010](https://redirect.github.com/ya7010) in [#​1695](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/pull/1695)
- Remove obsolete rustdoc lint schema and update references in cargo.json to use HTTPS URLs by [@​ya7010](https://redirect.github.com/ya7010) in [#​1696](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/pull/1696)

##### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fix oneOf hover branch selection by [@​ya7010](https://redirect.github.com/ya7010) in [#​1693](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/pull/1693)
- Fix adjacent applicator schema lookups in LSP by [@​ya7010](https://redirect.github.com/ya7010) in [#​1697](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/pull/1697)
- fix: Align LSP schema resolution with validation by [@​ya7010](https://redirect.github.com/ya7010) in [#​1698](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/pull/1698)

##### 🛠️ Other Changes

- Split Cargo lint schemas out of cargo.json by [@​ya7010](https://redirect.github.com/ya7010) in [#​1688](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/pull/1688)
- chore: Mark deprecated lints in cargo-lints-clippy.json by [@​ya7010](https://redirect.github.com/ya7010) in [#​1689](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/pull/1689)
- Deprecate `authors` field in `cargo.json` by [@​jelrwi](https://redirect.github.com/jelrwi) in [#​1699](https://redirect.github.com/tombi-toml/tombi/pull/1699)

#### New Contributors

<details>
<summary>zensical/zensical (zensical)</summary>

### [`v0.0.32`](https://redirect.github.com/zensical/zensical/releases/tag/v0.0.32): 0.0.32

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/zensical/zensical/compare/v0.0.31...v0.0.32)

#### Summary

This version fixes a bug where Markdown files used as snippets were included into auto-generated navigation, and a bug with prefix stripping when the site URL contains a path component. Additionally, the Pygments dependency was updated to mitigate a vulnerability.

#### Changelog

##### Bug fixes

- [`ca5d2d5`](https://redirect.github.com/zensical/zensical/commit/ca5d2d5) **zensical-serve** – strip base URL prefix as URL segment, not string ([#​499](https://redirect.github.com/zensical/zensical/issues/499))
- [`3a2358a`](https://redirect.github.com/zensical/zensical/commit/3a2358a) – update to latest Pygments to mitigate vulnerability ([#​485](https://redirect.github.com/zensical/zensical/issues/485))
- [`92b5622`](https://redirect.github.com/zensical/zensical/commit/92b5622) **zensical** – only collect markdown pages in docs directory ([#​490](https://redirect.github.com/zensical/zensical/issues/490))

</details>
